title: crotalaria peregrina
intro: Crotalaria peregrina, also known as the 'sticky pod' or 'jequirity bean', is a tropical plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The extracts of Crotalaria peregrina have been found to possess various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusion, decoction, and powder, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
